title: Vlookup-like function
excerpt: May we have a vlookup (MS Excel) like function in order to connect boards and realize automatically input data from other boards?

posts.cookedHtml: May we have a vlookup (MS Excel) like function in order to connect boards and realize automatically input data from other boards?

posts.author: deborah621 (deborah)
posts.cookedHtml:
e50346:

May we have a vlookup (MS Excel) like function in order to connect boards and realize automatically input data from other boards?

For instance, if you have a list of project IDs in one table and want to fetch corresponding project details from another table, you could set up XLOOKUP to search the project IDs and return the needed details.

If you’re working with a project management tool like monday.com, they offer a VLOOKUP Auto-link feature that can automatically link multiple boards and match board items, maintaining reporting and automation capabilities.

posts.author: Savita2024 (Savita Ubhayakar)
posts.cookedHtml: Unfortunately not all companies will support the VLookup app because it was designed by a third-party.
